Mapped repository structure and baseline validation state.
Added idempotent backend migration runner.
Added enterprise schema alignment migration with password_hash, refresh_tokens, notifications, audit_logs, indexes, and expanded security event constraints.
Made PostgreSQL startup tolerant of missing pgvector extension.
Wired migrations into backend startup.
Fixed Redis healthcheck authentication in Docker Compose.
Reworked Redis client degradation and in-memory rate-limit fallback.
Hardened JWT issuer/audience/type validation and generated token IDs.
Implemented refresh-token rotation storage and reuse-family revocation behavior.
Fixed password login failure modes, account lockout tracking, and audit/security logs.
Aligned face-login and face-registration payloads across backend and AI services.
Secured WebSocket connections with JWT verification and role-based supervisor rooms.
Mounted notification routes and fixed notification route ordering.
Implemented real leave request, team approval, rejection, cancellation, stats, audit, and notification routes.
Fixed geofence table mismatch from office_location to office_locations.
Fixed work report insert contract to use title, report_date, image_urls, and location metadata.
Fixed Excel export table mismatch from attendance to attendance_records.
Restricted security-monitoring routes to supervisor/admin roles.
Added backend Jest tests for token hardening and schema/route contract alignment.
Remediated high-severity npm audit findings in backend, frontend, and root packages.
Upgraded frontend Vite toolchain and added lazy route splitting to remove the monolithic route bundle.
Added live /api/attendance/today backend endpoint and wired dashboard/attendance pages to real check-in and check-out APIs.
Added security-monitoring API endpoints required by dashboard pages: login logs, system logs, spoof attempts, and geofence violations.
Removed obsolete Docker Compose version field warning.
Added frontend ESLint configuration and made lint validation pass.
Added migration dry-run support for CI validation without a live database.
Aligned the development Face AI Docker entrypoint with the production-compatible app.py service.
Replaced supervisor dashboard mock team attendance with live attendance history data.
V3-A1: Added production build verification system (verify-build.js) with bundle integrity, source map, performance budget, and asset hashing validation.
V3-A1: Added bundle analysis system (bundle-analysis.js) with size regression detection, baseline comparison, and optimization suggestions.
V3-A1: Enhanced Vite config with manualChunks vendor splitting, content-hashed filenames, esbuild minification, and chunk size warnings.
V3-A2: Added execution-state persistence engine (execution-state-manager.js) with integrity verification, rollback snapshots, duplicate prevention, and cross-validation.
V3-A2: Created validation-report.json and deployment-report.json for continuous state tracking.
V3-A3: Added central DegradedModeManager (degradedMode.js) tracking health of all services with automatic transitions and telemetry emission.
V3-A3: Added degraded-mode middleware with graceful fallbacks, observability headers, and write-blocking during outages.
V3-A3: Enhanced frontend DegradedModeBanner with circuit breaker visibility and V3 degraded-mode API integration.
V3-A4: Added production orchestration manager (orchestration-manager.js) with dependency graph validation, topological sort, cycle detection, and HTTP health probing.
V3-A5: Added enterprise telemetry collector with API latency percentiles, error rate tracking, memory monitoring, and Prometheus-compatible metrics endpoint.
V3-A5: Created SystemStatusDashboard page with realtime operational telemetry visualization for service health, circuit breakers, and degraded events.
V3-A6: Added API versioning middleware with Accept-Version/X-API-Version headers, URL prefix detection, deprecation warnings, and backward compatibility.
V3-A6: Added feature flag infrastructure with environment-based configuration and middleware for staged rollouts.
V5-P1: Added in-memory priority job queue (jobQueue.js) with dead-letter queue, idempotency, retry/exponential backoff, and graceful drain.
V5-P1: Added background worker processors for notifications, audit logs, security events, analytics, and AI inference.
V5-P1: Added AI service startup warmup probing with degraded-mode transitions.
V5-P1: Enhanced graceful shutdown with job queue drain and structured logging.
V5-P2: Created comprehensive GitHub Actions CI pipeline (ci.yml) covering backend tests, frontend lint/build/verify, AI syntax check, Docker validation, orchestration check, and security scanning.

V5-P3: Created Kubernetes manifests — namespace, backend-api deployment with HPA autoscaling, frontend and AI service deployments, PostgreSQL StatefulSet, Redis deployment, and Ingress with TLS and WebSocket support.
V5-P4: Added TOTP-based MFA system (RFC 6238) with pure-JS implementation — no extra dependencies.
V5-P4: Created MFA API routes (enroll, verify, validate, disable, status) with backup code support.
V5-P4: Created migration 002 adding MFA columns, audit_logs table, and notifications table.
V5-P5: Expanded test suite to 27 tests across 4 suites — enterprise systems, MFA TOTP, auth middleware, and schema contracts.
V6-P1: Fixed CI pipeline working-directory bug for build verification and bundle analysis steps.
V6-P1: Added K8s manifest YAML validation step to CI infrastructure job.
V6-P3: Created Helm chart (Chart.yaml, values.yaml, templates: namespace, backend-api, secrets, ingress) with full configurability.
V6-P4: Added RBAC permission middleware with hierarchical roles (admin > supervisor > employee) and fine-grained named permissions.
V6-P4: Added request correlation ID middleware (X-Request-Id) for distributed tracing.
V6-P4: Enhanced error handler with circuit-breaker 503 responses, request ID propagation, and retry-after headers.
V6-P4: Added /api/system/permissions and /api/system/traces endpoints.
V6-P4: Protected queue stats endpoint with supervisor RBAC.
V6-P4: Enhanced health endpoint with queue stats, uptime, and version.
V6-P5: Created OpenTelemetry-compatible tracing engine with W3C Trace Context, span lifecycle, ring buffer, and Express middleware.
V6-P5: Created enterprise rate limiter factory with per-route config, user-identity-aware keys, and telemetry logging.
V6-P5: Created Prometheus + Grafana + Loki observability stack Kubernetes manifests.
V6-P5: Enhanced production docker-compose with resource limits, AOF persistence, and RUN_MIGRATIONS.
V6-P6: Expanded test suite to 47 tests across 6 suites (added RBAC, correlation ID, error handler, tracing engine tests).
V7-P1: Added Redis pub/sub adapter for Socket.IO horizontal WebSocket scaling with auto-detection and graceful fallback.
V7-P1: Added distributed lock manager with Redis SETNX + TTL and in-memory fallback for cross-instance coordination.
V7-P1: Added request timeout middleware with configurable per-route limits (30s default, 120s uploads, 10s MFA).
V7-P2: Added enterprise security headers middleware (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Permissions-Policy, API cache prevention).
V7-P3: Created frontend system API service (typed systemApi.ts) for health, status, features, permissions, queue, and tracing endpoints.
V7-P4: Added impossible travel detection engine with Haversine distance, max-speed thresholds, severity classification, and alert ring buffer.
V7-P4: Added WebSocket telemetry collector tracking active/peak connections, auth failures, messages, with Prometheus export.
V7-P4: Wired WebSocket telemetry into connection/disconnect/auth-failure handlers in websocket.js.
V7-P5: Created Terraform IaC — main.tf (AWS/K8s/Helm providers, S3 backend), variables.tf, infrastructure.tf (VPC, EKS, RDS Multi-AZ, ElastiCache), outputs.tf.
V7-P5: Enhanced server.js health endpoint with lock stats and tracing summary.
V7-P5: Enhanced server.js startup log with V7 observability flags (tracing, correlationId, rbac, requestTimeout, securityHeaders).
V7-P6: Expanded test suite to 70 tests across 8 suites (added distributed lock, request timeout, security headers, impossible travel, WS telemetry tests).
V8-P1: Added device trust scoring engine with fingerprinting, trust levels (high/medium/low), and per-user device/IP tracking.
V8-P1: Added startup config validator enforcing required env vars and JWT secret strength in production.
V8-P1: Added in-process event bus with async publish/subscribe, error isolation, and telemetry integration.
V8-P2: Created SIEM-ready audit log exporter producing CEF and JSON formats for Splunk/ELK/Datadog.
V8-P2: Created canary + blue-green K8s deployment manifests with PodDisruptionBudget for zero-downtime.
V8-P3: Created frontend MFA API client (typed mfaApi.ts) for enroll, verify, validate, disable, status.
V8-P4: Wired impossible travel detection into face-login success path with automatic IMPOSSIBLE_TRAVEL security events.
V8-P4: Wired device trust registration into both password and face login success paths.
V8-P4: Wired event bus emissions (auth.login) into both login flows with device trust context.
V8-P5: Enhanced server.js with startup config validation, event bus stats in health endpoint.
V8-P6: Expanded test suite to 85 tests across 9 suites (added device trust, config validator, event bus, SIEM exporter tests).
